attempts.strategy: Repair the handed-in scaffold (planner claimed '2 expected sorrys / compiles' but lemma had 4 hard elaboration errors)
attempts.code_tried: obtain ⟨a, d, hmk⟩ := IsLocalization.mk'_surjective ... ; rw [map_mul, hs, IsScalarTower.algebraMap_apply ...] ; (... v).mpr ...; rw[hZv]; exact d.2
attempts.lean_error: Unknown identifier `s`/`d`; Application type mismatch; rewrite pattern not found; motive not type correct
attempts.insight: Four plumbing bugs: (1) mk'_surjective returns ∃(x:R×M), so destructure ⟨⟨a,d⟩,hmk⟩ not ⟨a,d,hmk⟩; (2) IsScalarTower.algebraMap_apply rewrites needed REVERSE direction (← ) since `this` already has algebraMap S K (algebraMap Γ S ·) shape; (3) intValuation_eq_one_iff_mem_primeCompl is ∀r, apply to both v and element; (4) hd_mem motive-not-type-correct (d's type mentions the ideal) worked around by `change (d) ∉ v.asIdeal; rw[hZv]; exact d.2`. The order↔valuation arithmetic in scaffold was already correct.

next_steps: Consumed by chart_mem_range_of_forall_order_nonneg; file fully sorry-free.

attempts.strategy: Blueprint route verbatim: Dedekind+fraction-field setup → mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one → per height-one prime build the point via fromSpec, coheight-one computation, apply per-prime lemma
attempts.code_tried: apply mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one; intro v; set P := ⟨v.asIdeal, v.isPrime⟩; y := hV.fromSpec P; Z := ⟨y, hco⟩; have hZv via round-trip; exact chart_valuation_le_one_of_order_nonneg hdim g Z v hZv (h Z)

attempts.insight: hZv round-trip closed by injectivity of the open immersion: `apply hV.fromSpec.isOpenEmbedding.injective; rw [hV.fromSpec_primeIdealOf]`. Dead end: (IsAffineOpen.isOpenImmersion_fromSpec hV).base_injective — no such field at PresheafedSpace.IsOpenImmersion level; the scheme-Hom-level .isOpenEmbedding.injective is the right handle.

next_steps: Axiom-clean. Ready for OcOfD bridge-assembly lane (next iter imports this).

attempts.strategy: Build the equivalence as the INVERSE of a manifestly k̄-linear surjection fromKbar : k̄ →ₗ[k̄] (M₂⧸N'), c ↦ [t⁻¹·algebraMap k̄ K c], t=π_P^{n+1}; prove bijective; assemble via quotEquivOfEq ≪≫ (ofBijective fromKbar).symm
attempts.code_tried: set R := stalk; π = (exists_irreducible R).choose; t = π^(n+1); βfun c = germ of constant section; hconst: residue R (βfun c) = algebraMap k̄ κ(P) c via Γevaluation_naturality; hrat: ord≥0 ⟹ lift to R; injectivity (t⁻¹c∈M₁ impossible for nonzero const); surjectivity via hrat(t·g)

attempts.goal_before: (orderAtP ([P]+D) P ⧸ range(inclusion orderAtP D P)) ≃ₗ[kbar] kbar
attempts.insight: Inverse-of-surjection avoids defining any partial lift function — all content in bijectivity. GOTCHAS logged: building data in by-elaborated def use .choose NOT obtain/rcases (Prop-elimination); Algebra k̄/SMul k̄ on the stalk are NOT synthesizable — proof structured to never need a k̄-module on the stalk; only IsFractionRing(stalk)K + IsDiscreteValuationRing(stalk). hconst is the genuine scheme-compat crux (residue of constant section = residueFieldAlgebra image).

next_steps: Closing this sole leaf makes the WHOLE cokernel-iso chain axiom-clean (orderAtP_quotient_iso_kbar, cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar, cokernel_skyscraper_hom(_isIso), cokernel_carrierSheafHom_iso_skyscraper). Next: bridge assembly + 2 SES corners.
